summary: E-commerce Reconciliation module fully tested. All 16 backend API tests passed (1 skipped). Frontend UI verified: E-commerce Reconciliation dashboard at /finance/ecommerce-reconciliation loads correctly with statements table, summary cards, transactions table, orders tab, alerts tab, and upload dialog. Order Source dropdown in Create Outbound Dispatch form works with all 6 options (Amazon, Flipkart, Website, Walk-in, Direct Sale, Other). Marketplace Order ID field appears conditionally when Amazon/Flipkart is selected.
critical_code_review_comments: E-commerce Reconciliation module properly parses Amazon CSV with correct column mapping (Date, Transaction type, Order ID, Product Details, Total product charges, Total promotional rebates, Amazon fees, Other, Total INR)
Transaction categorization correctly identifies order_payment, refund, reserve_held, reserve_released types
Order matching uses marketplace_order_id, order_id, and external_order_id for CRM dispatch lookup
Alerts API correctly identifies unmatched orders, unmatched refunds, and high fee alerts (>25% of sale)
Export functionality supports summary, orders, transactions, refunds, and unmatched export types
Order Source field in dispatch form correctly shows after firm selection with proper conditional rendering
Marketplace Order ID field appears only for Amazon/Flipkart order sources
seed_data_creation: Test CSV uploaded during backend testing created statement STMT-AMA-20260404150801 with 3 test transactions
context_for_next_testing_agent: E-commerce Reconciliation module fully implemented and working. Dashboard at /finance/ecommerce-reconciliation. 2 Amazon statements exist in system. Order Source field in dispatch form requires firm selection first. Sidebar shows 'E-commerce Recon' under Finance menu.

features_tested.GET /api/ecommerce/statements: PASS - Returns list of payout statements with summary data
features_tested.GET /api/ecommerce/statements/{id}: PASS - Returns statement with transactions and order_summaries
features_tested.GET /api/ecommerce/alerts: PASS - Returns unmatched_order, unmatched_refund, high_fees alerts
features_tested.GET /api/ecommerce/order-reconciliation: PASS - Returns order summaries with match status
features_tested.POST /api/ecommerce/upload-payout?platfo: PASS - Parses CSV and creates statement
features_tested.E-commerce Reconciliation Dashboard UI: PASS - Page loads with title, tabs, statements table
features_tested.Statement Summary Cards: PASS - Shows Order Payments, Refunds, Platform Fees, Reserve Held, Reserve Released, Net Payout
features_tested.Transactions Table: PASS - Shows transactions with Link buttons for unmatched
features_tested.Orders Tab: PASS - Shows order summaries with CRM Match status
features_tested.Alerts Tab: PASS - Shows alerts with Link to CRM buttons
features_tested.Upload Statement Dialog: PASS - Platform dropdown, file input, expected columns info
features_tested.Order Source Dropdown in Dispatch Form: PASS - Shows 6 options: Amazon, Flipkart, Website, Walk-in, Direct Sale, Other
features_tested.Sidebar Navigation: PASS - E-commerce Recon menu item under Finance
